name: Memorial Credit Union
description_short: Memorial Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union offering savings, checking, loans, credit cards, and mortgages to members in the Houston area with competitive rates and digital banking tools.
description_long:
Memorial Credit Union (MCU) is a credit union based in Houston, Texas, located at 7789 Southwest Freeway, Suite 175. As a member-owned financial cooperative, MCU operates under credit union principles and is federally insured. The organization has been providing financial services to its membership community with a focus on personalized member service and competitive lending rates.

MCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including savings accounts, checking accounts, youth accounts, certificates of deposit, and individual retirement accounts (IRAs). On the lending side, they provide personal loans (as low as 8.75% APR), auto loans (as low as 4.14% APR for new and used vehicles), credit cards (as low as 12.9% APR), mortgage loans, and student loans. The credit union also offers supplementary services like debt protection, auto protection plans, skip-a-payment options, and an auto buying center to assist members with vehicle purchases.

MCU distinguishes itself through digital-first banking capabilities including MCU Online, a mobile app, remote deposit capture, digital wallet integration, bill pay, wire transfers, and e-statements. The organization provides a RoundUp Program for savings automation, fraud prevention resources, identity protection services, and a member referral program. They maintain multiple physical touchpoints with branch locations and free ATM access, combined with extended drive-thru hours (7:00am-6:00pm Monday-Friday) for working members.

As a credit union, MCU operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned model, theoretically returning profits to members rather than external shareholders. However, membership eligibility is restricted—they do not serve the general public, with specific membership criteria detailed on their "Who Can Join" page. Their service area appears concentrated in the Houston metropolitan region based on their single listed address, which may limit accessibility for members outside the area. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 4.14% APR for new and used vehicles
Extended drive-thru hours (7:00am-6:00pm weekdays) accommodating working members
Comprehensive digital banking platform including mobile app, remote deposit capture, bill pay, and digital wallet integration
Free ATM network access in addition to branch locations
Membership in a not-for-profit cooperative structure theoretically returning value to members
Member Auto Center providing free pre-approval, dealer locating, and incentive information
Multiple loan protection options including debt protection and auto protection plans
cons: Limited branch presence appears concentrated to Houston area, reducing accessibility for non-local members
Restricted membership eligibility—not open to general public, requiring specific membership criteria
Credit card APR starting at 12.9% is higher than many national credit card issuers
Signature loan rates of 8.75% minimum are moderate compared to some online personal lenders
Website does not clearly disclose specific membership eligibility requirements upfront
best_for: Houston-area residents seeking competitive auto financing with extended drive-thru service hours
Members who qualify for credit union membership and want comprehensive digital banking and lending options
Auto buyers wanting free pre-approval and dealer coordination before dealership visits
Members seeking a member-owned financial institution with not-for-profit governance
diagnosis: Memorial Credit Union is best for eligible members in the Houston area seeking comprehensive, member-owned banking with competitive auto lending rates and robust digital banking capabilities. The primary caveat is restricted membership eligibility and limited geographic footprint, making it inaccessible to the general public and members outside the Houston service area.
services: Auto loans for new and used vehicles (4.14% APR minimum)
Mobile banking app and MCU Online portal
Bill pay and wire transfer services
Auto buying center with dealer coordination
Debt protection and auto protection plans
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
